# FDE Field Test

> A bilingual public capability challenge and reference for Field Deployment Engineers, published by the OneX AI Community and based on the OneX FDE Assessment and Training Framework.

The public site explains how an FDE connects enterprise problems, AI capability, operational constraints, and accountable delivery outcomes. It offers a 12-scenario potential profile and three sequential assessment levels: Foundation (100 questions), Delivery (60 questions), and Command (40 questions).

The online challenge measures knowledge and scenario judgment. It does not constitute formal graduation, professional certification, or proof of real-project capability. Formal review still requires project artifacts, a working solution, acceptance evidence, live challenge, operational controls, and stakeholder feedback.

## Canonical public pages

- [FDE 水平测试](https://fde.onex.plus/): Chinese public challenge and three-level assessment.
- [FDE Field Test](https://fde.onex.plus/en/): Native-English mirror of the complete challenge.
- [FDE 是什么？](https://fde.onex.plus/fde-guide/): Chinese reference covering the role, responsibilities, five-dimension capability model, comparisons, method, and boundaries.
- [What Is an FDE?](https://fde.onex.plus/en/fde-guide/): English reference covering the Field Deployment Engineer role, capability model, comparisons, method, and boundaries.
- [FDE 小班实战培训](https://fde.onex.plus/fde-training/): Application-led training for no more than 10 people per cohort, with dates confirmed after review.
- [成为 FDE](https://fde.onex.plus/become-fde/): The staged path from public challenge and training to separate talent admission and formal certification.
- [企业寻找 FDE](https://fde.onex.plus/enterprise/): Enterprise guidance and access to the public talent directory; structured demand submission is not live yet.
- [FDE 人才目录](https://fde.onex.plus/talents/): Authorized, reviewed, privacy-safe public profiles without precise test-score ranking.

Training application, course admission, talent-network admission, and public assessment are separate states; training does not itself constitute certification or a OneX badge.
Talent-network membership does not itself mean OneX certification. Unverified members are labeled "尚未完成 OneX 认证" and do not receive a platform certification badge.

## Publisher and update information

- Publisher: OneX AI Community
- Reviewed: 2026-07-16
- Reference version: 1.0
- Preferred citation name: OneX FDE Field Test
